title: tofieldiaceae
intro: The Tofieldiaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a small family of monocots, characterized by having a distinct set of floral and vegetative features. The Tofieldiaceae family is typically found in the Northern Hemisphere, with species often thriving in a variety of habitats including wetlands and grasslands. This family includes a limited number of species, primarily found in the genera Tofieldia and Pseudognaphalium.
